proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: shell-injection
; LINE: 104
; PROVEN: Shell Injection at extractWitness
(declare-const input_has_metachar Int)
(declare-const input_sanitized Int)
; Guard: sanitization function called before exec
(assert (= input_sanitized 1))
; Can unsanitized input reach shell?
(assert (and (= input_has_metachar 1) (= input_sanitized 1)))
(assert (= input_sanitized 0))
(check-sat)
; unsat → proven: sanitization prevents injection
